title: ヘイ！ユーはトレーナーでーす☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is tryouts—an important event to determine the future of
Tracen students ready to take their game to the next level.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eager up-and-comers have assembled at the track, hoping to break
away from the pack and make their formal debut.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wow, would ya look at this crowd! It's just like a party!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Since everybody's here, maybe we ought to have a barbecue after the
race!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: How 'bout you, partner? You in?

text_block_list.name: Timid Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huh? Um... I think I'll have to pass...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Aww, really? That's a shame. Maybe next week then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Among them, one particular Umamusume stands out in a different
way.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle... The talent's definitely there, but she could stand to
exercise a bit more self-control.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
She does tend to bungle her starts, even in scrimmages. I wonder how
she'll fare today?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At long last, the race begins with all eyes on Taiki Shuttle.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaaaaaw!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And here comes Taiki Shuttle! Just look at her go! That is some
awesome speed, folks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her sprint at the outset is indeed a sight to behold. However...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what's this? Taiki Shuttle appears to be losing steam! She's slowly
falling behind in the homestretch!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer A
text_block_list.text: What?! Of all the times to get distracted! What is she thinking?

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, it looks like her lack of focus is the main thing holding her
back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In the end, she fails to claim a satisfactory position in the rankings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon leaving the venue, I spot a figure wobbling out of the corner of
my eye.

text_block_list.name: Timid Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Urgh... My head is spinning...

text_block_list.name: Timid Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Eek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seemingly unwell, she stumbles and starts to fall. But just as I try to
rush over...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Daaash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A blur immediately speeds past me.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: And caaatch!

text_block_list.name: Timid Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With breathtaking speed, Taiki flies over like a gust of wind to make
a spectacular save.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Good! Made it in the nick of time!

text_block_list.name: Timid Umamusume
text_block_list.text: W-wait, what? Taiki Shuttle?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I thought ya seemed a tad under the weather earlier. It ain't good to
push yourself too hard!

text_block_list.name: Timid Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Y-you noticed?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course I did!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Now, we'd better get ya to the nurse. Here—climb on up and hold on
tight, okay?

text_block_list.name: Timid Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Okay, here we go! Make way, everybody! Medical emergency, comin'
through!

text_block_list.name: Timid Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Aaahh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki takes off running again at such a tremendous pace that it's hard
to believe she's carrying someone on her back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Filled with a mix of curiosity and concern, I follow after them.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm so glad it's nothing serious! Take care now, ya hear?

text_block_list.name: Timid Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I will! Thanks, Taiki! See you later!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: See ya!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm so happy to see her smilin'! Life's good when everybody's
happy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: ...Oh! How long have you been there?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Me? Wait, that badge on your collar...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me... I'm being scouted?! That's gotta be what this is!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaaaaaw! Yes, yes, a thousand times yes! I'm so happy!
choice_data_list: Wait, I didn't say anything abou—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I gotta go send a letter to my family! And all my friends back home
too!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Ooh, and this calls for a party! You're invited too, of course!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You can always count on some good eatin' at one of my barbecues!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Let's get all the details ironed out tomorrow! We'll be training
partners from now on, after all!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Welp, see ya tomorrow, Trainer! I can't wait to get this show on the
road!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With a final cheerful wave of her hand, Taiki flies off like a whirlwind.
